scripts.docker:reset: node scripts/check-ports.mjs && docker-compose down && rm -f backend/.data/strata-dev.db && node scripts/gen-version.mjs all && docker-compose build --parallel && docker-compose up
scripts.docker:nuke: node scripts/check-ports.mjs && docker-compose down && rm -f backend/.data/strata-dev.db && docker image prune -a -f && node scripts/gen-version.mjs all && docker-compose build --no-cache --parallel && docker-compose up
scripts.docker:prod: DB_FILE=strata.db NODE_ENV=production ENABLE_SWAGGER=false RESTART_POLICY=always sh -c 'node scripts/gen-version.mjs all && docker-compose up --build -d'
